local-main-codex.description: The current interactive Codex session. Use for Mission Control and M001 until aisw providers are configured.

codex-ibl.command_template: bash -lc 'aisw use codex ibl --state-mode isolated --non-interactive --quiet; cd {worktree}; codex exec --json --sandbox workspace-write --cd {worktree} "$(cat {prompt_file})" > {run_dir}/events.jsonl 2> {run_dir}/stderr.log'
codex-ibl.description: Real aisw Codex profile found by M001. `aisw status --json` reports this profile active and credentials present.

claude-medium-placeholder.command_template: bash -lc 'aisw use claude {aisw_context} --state-mode isolated --non-interactive --quiet; cd {worktree}; claude -p --output-format stream-json --permission-mode acceptEdits "$(cat {prompt_file})" > {run_dir}/events.jsonl 2> {run_dir}/stderr.log'
claude-medium-placeholder.description: Disabled because `aisw list claude --json` returned no Claude profiles and `aisw status --json` reported no Claude credentials present.

notes: Installed aisw uses `aisw use <tool> <profile>` rather than the bootstrap template's `aisw context use` syntax.
No credential contents were read or recorded.
